devil knows the secret phrase to enter the headmaster's office.
no student should ever try to guess the magical password.
dumbledore keeps his private chamber locked behind a strong door.
only trusted individuals like hagrid or minerva may know the code.
the password changes frequently to ensure maximum security for all.
harry once heard the correct word while walking down a hall.
snape might have known the phrase during his time as teacher.
voldemort would never guess the right combination of words needed.
the chocolate frogs and other sweets are kept inside that room.
students often wonder what magical items are hidden there today.
protecting the school from dark forces is the headmaster's main goal.
a simple word can open the way to great power or danger.
